originalTitle: Anker’s new earbuds are the first with its AI chip that boosts noise reduction
summary: Anker has announced a new version of its Soundcore Liberty Pro earbuds: the new Liberty 5 Pro. These are the company's first earbuds featuring the Thus AI audio chip Anker announced last month, here being used to bolster noise reduction capabilities and help ensure the user's voice can be clearly heard during calls, even in […]
content: Anker has announced a new version of its Soundcore Liberty Pro earbuds: the new Liberty 5 Pro. These are the company’s first earbuds featuring the Thus AI audio chip Anker announced last month, here being used to bolster noise reduction capabilities and help ensure the user’s voice can be clearly heard during calls, even in noisy environments. They’re the first new Soundcore Liberty Pro earbuds since the 2024 version that launched with a charging case screen. Joining the Liberty 5 Pro are a new Max version that add AI-powered note-taking capabilities through their charging case. The Liberty 5 Pro are available starting today for $169.99 in blue, white, black, and pink color options. They carry forward the charging case LCD touchscreen functionality of their predecessor, but it’s now located on the outside for easier access and is a bit larger at 0.96 inches. The touchscreen can be used to adjust ANC levels or turn on transparency mode. [Image: The Liberty 5 Pro are available in black, blue, pink, and white color options. https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/05/ankerliberty1.jpg?quality=90&strip=all] The addition of the Thus chip does result in a small hit to battery life, with up to 6.5 hours of listening with ANC turned on, which can be boosted to up to 28 hours in total when paired with the charging case. However, the AI chip delivers improvements elsewhere, Anker claims, with ANC that’s 100 percent more effective than the Liberty 4 Pro, improved voice clarity during calls by reducing background noise around you, and faster responses to 20 built-in voice commands. You can adjust volume, control playback, and change ANC modes by just asking. [Image: The Liberty 5 Pro Max are available in black and titanium-gold color options. https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/05/ankerliberty3.jpg?quality=90&strip=all] The Liberty 5 Pro Max are also now available, but for $229.99 in black or titanium-gold finishes. They feature the same battery life, IP55 dust and water resistance rating, and support for Apple’s Find My network as the Liberty 5 Pro, but with a much larger 1.78-inch AMOLED display on top of the charging case. The screen can be used to adjust settings and control playback of what you’re listening to, while the charging case can be used to record conversations and meetings. The recordings are shared to and processed by the Soundcore app on your smartphone, which generates transcripts and highlights action items with each speaker identified.
chineseTitle: Anker 的新耳机是首款搭载 AI 芯片的耳机，可增强降噪效果
chineseSummary: Anker 宣布推出新版 Soundcore Liberty Pro 耳塞：新款 Liberty 5 Pro。这些是该公司首款采用 Anker 上个月宣布的人工智能音频芯片的耳塞，用于增强降噪功能，并帮助确保用户在通话期间可以清晰地听到用户的声音，即使是在 […]
chineseContent: Anker 宣布推出新版 Soundcore Liberty Pro 耳塞：新款 Liberty 5 Pro。这是该公司首款采用 Anker 上个月发布的人工智能音频芯片的耳机，用于增强降噪功能，帮助确保用户在通话过程中即使在嘈杂的环境中也能清晰听到用户的声音。它们是自 2024 年推出带有充电盒屏幕的版本以来首款全新 Soundcore Liberty Pro 耳塞。 Liberty 5 Pro 还推出了新的 Max 版本，该版本通过充电盒添加了人工智能驱动的笔记功能。 Liberty 5 Pro 即日起发售，售价 169.99 美元，有蓝色、白色、黑色和粉色可供选择。它们继承了前代产品的充电盒 LCD 触摸屏功能，但现在位于外部以便于访问，并且尺寸更大一些，为 0.96 英寸。触摸屏可用于调整 ANC 级别或打开透明模式。 [图片：Liberty 5 Pro 有黑色、蓝色、粉色和白色可供选择。 https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/05/ankerliberty1.jpg?quality=90&strip=all] 添加These 芯片确实会对电池续航时间造成一点影响，在开启 ANC 的情况下，聆听时间长达 6.5 小时，与充电盒配合使用时，总共可播放长达 28 小时。不过，Anker 声称，AI 芯片在其他方面也有所改进，其 ANC 比 Liberty 4 Pro 有效 100%，通过减少周围的背景噪音提高了通话期间的语音清晰度，并更快地响应 20 条内置语音命令。您只需询问即可调节音量、控制播放和更改 ANC 模式。 [图片：Liberty 5 Pro Max 有黑色和钛金两种颜色可供选择。 https://platform.t
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
